title: randia drupacea
intro: Randia drupacea, also known as the Indian plum or Karvi, is a type of shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, such as treating fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Randia drupacea include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be made by boiling the roots, leaves, and bark in water to create a medicinal concoction.
